title: rubus thyrsiflorus subsp. thyrsanthus
intro: Rubus thyrsiflorus subsp. thyrsanthus, also known as the Taiwanese raspberry or Taiwanese bramble, is a type of flowering raspberry native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus thyrsiflorus subsp. thyrsanthus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
